name: Allied Farmers Limited
summary: Allied Farmers Limited, through its subsidiaries, sells and purchases livestock in New Zealand. The company engages in the procurement, processing, and sale of calves. It also provides livestock financing, rural, and nominee services; rural finance; and online services through its MyLivestock website. The company was formerly known as The Farmers Co-operative Organisation Society of New Zealand Limited and changed its name to Allied Farmers Limited in 1996. Allied Farmers Limited was founded in 1913 and is based in Stratford, New Zealand.
